ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Product line of the product */,
  "product_class" TEXT /* Class of the product */,
  "product_size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "list_price" REAL /* List price of the product */,
  "standard_cost" REAL /* Standard cost of the product */,
  "product_first_sold_date" TEXT /* Date the product was first sold */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer is enrolled in */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit of the customer */,
  "customer_since_date" TEXT /* Date the customer first made a purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "online_order" INTEGER /* Whether the transaction was an online order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Approved, Pending, Canceled) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, refund) */,
  "promo_code" TEXT /* Promotional code used in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_promo_code FOREIGN KEY ("promo_code") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that generated the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address the order was shipped to */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., ground, air) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_method FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_method") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("shipping_method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., processed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "vendor_address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "vendor_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "reward_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for earning rewards */,
  "reward_value" REAL /* Value of the rewards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "shipping_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "shipping_method_description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping method */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)
